tracks.rawText: 4:00Mr Blue Skyv5.5CoverOrchestral pop and glam rock fusion, Features a prominent string section with staccato violins and cellos, a driving acoustic guitar strumming eighth notes, and a punchy electric bass, The drum kit uses a heavy snare on the backbeat with shimmering tambourine accents, A grand piano provides rhythmic chord stabs, Vocals are multi-tracked male tenors with frequent falsetto harmonies and choral backing, The arrangement includes a vocoder-processed bridge and a melodic slide guitar solo, Key of F major, 127 BPM, 4/4 time signature4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Mr Blue Sky
